landing.title: PLAYER TYPE LAB
landing.intro: Play 8 mini-games to find out what kind of player you are. 16 game style types — which one is yours?

intro.title: Ready?
intro.consent: Anonymous play data will be sent to improve accuracy

quick-stop.title: QUICK STOP
quick-stop.rules: Tap to stop the bar when it enters the green zone. The zone shrinks each round. 10 rounds.

mission-brief.title: MISSION BRIEF
mission-brief.rules: Read the team report for 5 seconds, then answer detail questions. 5 rounds.

quest-select.title: QUEST SELECT
quest-select.rules: Pick quests to maximize reward within a 10-turn budget. Confirm in 30 seconds.

loot-allocation.title: LOOT ALLOCATION
loot-allocation.rules: Distribute 1000G among 4 party members after the raid. 3 rounds.

quick-react.title: QUICK REACT
quick-react.rules: Tap the moment the screen turns green! Tapping early counts as a foul. 5 trials.

target-hunter.title: TARGET HUNTER
target-hunter.rules: Tap targets as they appear. Avoid fakes (× marks). 30 seconds.

sequence-memory.title: SEQUENCE MEMORY
sequence-memory.rules: Remember the flashing sequence and repeat it. One more tile added each round.

pattern-predictor.title: FLASH SENSE
pattern-predictor.rules: Dots flash briefly. How many were there? Don't count — feel it. 8 rounds.

single-stroke.title: SINGLE STROKE
single-stroke.rules: Trace every edge exactly once without lifting your pen. 3 puzzles.

code-breaker.title: CODE BREAKER
code-breaker.rules: Crack the 4-digit code in 8 tries. Hit = right digit + right place. Blow = right digit only.

rpg-crossroads.title: RPG CROSSROADS
rpg-crossroads.rules: Choose your response in 5 scenarios. Trust your instincts.

party-pick.title: PARTY PICK
party-pick.rules: Pick 3 from 6 candidates to form your party.

SDLP.name: The Strategist
SDLP.description: A quiet thinker who builds long-term strategies. Rather than standing in the spotlight, they find satisfaction in crafting the perfect move from the shadows.

SDLI.name: The Debugger
SDLI.description: A lone solver who dismantles the world with logic and data. Never stops thinking until they find the perfect answer.

VDLP.name: The Commander
VDLP.description: A strategic leader who uses snap decisions and logic to drive a group toward the future. Reads situations instantly and finds the shortest path to the goal.

VDLI.name: The Raid Leader
VDLI.catchphrase: Win the argument, rewrite the rules
VDLI.description: A debate-driven player who moves situations with intellectual challenge and improvisation. Questions conventions and wins with tactics nobody else tries.

SDHP.name: The Lorekeeper
SDHP.catchphrase: Knows the story of the world better than anyone
SDHP.description: Pursuing a long-term mission with inner vision and strong empathy. Moves the world quietly but surely.

SDHI.name: The Roleplayer
SDHI.description: An idealist who lives by values and imagination. Trusts the inner voice over outside approval and keeps adding beauty to the world.

VDHP.name: The Guildmaster
VDHP.catchphrase: Building a stage where everyone shines
VDHP.description: A charismatic leader who binds people with vision and empathy, guiding the group toward growth. Builds a passionate guild where no one is left behind.

VDHI.name: The Adventurer
VDHI.description: A free-style explorer who expands the world with curiosity and empathy. New encounters and ideas are the fuel.

SOLP.name: The Speedrunner
SOLP.description: An efficiency-focused player who masters the rules and runs the shortest route. Once committed, they execute without compromise.

SOHP.name: The Healer
SOHP.catchphrase: There when someone is about to fall
SOHP.description: The quiet backbone who supports teammates with warm observation and dedication. The team's emotional pillar.

VOLP.name: The Captain
VOLP.catchphrase: Move the team, run toward the goal
VOLP.description: A frontline leader who drives the team with clear rules and goals. Prioritizes discipline over emotion and proves it through results.

VOHP.name: The Supporter
VOHP.catchphrase: Creating a party where everyone smiles
VOHP.description: A social player who connects the group with harmony and warmth. Reads the room and makes sure everyone feels at home.

SOLI.name: The Sniper
SOLI.catchphrase: One shot, one hit. No waste.
SOLI.description: A solo operator who moves with observation and improvisation. No extra words needed — actions speak louder.

SOHI.name: The Crafter
SOHI.catchphrase: One-of-a-kind work, at my own pace
SOHI.description: An artisan player who colors the world with sensibility and improvisation. Prioritizes personal aesthetics over trends and creates things nobody can replicate.

VOLI.name: The Assaulter
VOLI.description: A frontal force who breaks through situations with action and guts. Sees opportunity over risk — a tough front-runner.

VOHI.name: The Performer
VOHI.catchphrase: The world is your stage. You're the star.
VOHI.description: A born entertainer who sweeps others along with energy and empathy. Lives every moment to the fullest.
